title: pulmonaria villosula
intro: Pulmonaria villosula, also known as woolly lungwort, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the borage family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Pulmonaria villosula include soothing irritated mucous membranes, reducing congestion, and promoting overall lung health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions or allergic reactions.
